combination of alpha and numeric characters. 
This variable was only available 2006–2013. 
SHORT NAME: PDE_PRSCRBR_ID_FRMT_CD 
LONG NAME: PDE_PRSCRBR_ID_FRMT_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
PDE (derived) 
VALUES: 
N = PDE prescriber ID has an NPI format: 10 numeric characters with the first character a “1” or a “2” 
D = PDE prescriber ID has a DEA format: 9 alpha-numeric characters with the first two characters alpha 
and the last seven numeric 
U = PDE
